scripts.build: yarn prebuild && find . -name '*.lambda.ts' -exec sh -c 'ENVIRONMENT=$(basename {} .lambda.ts) && FUNCTION=$(basename $(dirname {})) && yarn esbuild {} --bundle --minify --sourcemap --platform=node --outfile=dist/$ENVIRONMENT/$FUNCTION/index.js' \;
scripts.postbuild: find dist/*/* -type d -exec sh -c 'cd {} && zip -r index.zip *' \;
